description: Create a temperature sensor via chat

turns.user: Add a new device sensor-office named 'Office Temp', type temp_sensor, MQTT connection

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent should call shell tool running `neomind device create` with device_id=sensor-office, name=Office Temp, device_type=temp_sensor, adapter_type=mqtt
expectations.overall: No exploratory calls; should report success after creation
